title: MacOS Podman machine builds do not enforce lint checks
body:
### Issue Description

In CI, linting on the `osx_alt_build_task` task is disabled.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Open a PR

### Describe the results you received

Task runs `make lint || true`

### Describe the results you expected

Task runs `make lint` and returns a zero exit-code.

### podman info output

```yaml
N/A
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

N/A

### Additional information

N/A

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
